title: ficus racemosa var. elongata
intro: Ficus racemosa var. elongata, also known as the Indian banyan or fig tree, is a variant of the Ficus racemosa species, characterized by its long, slender branches and aerial roots. The plant has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ficus racemosa var. elongata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
